targets.rawSql:
SELECT name AS "Device", ha_temperature AS "Temperature"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_temperature IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT timestamp AS time, name AS metric, median(ha_temperature) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_temperature IS NOT NULL
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, name || ' (actual)' AS metric, median(ha_heating_tist) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_tist IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_tist < 253
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, name || ' (set)' AS metric, first(ha_heating_tsoll) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_tsoll IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_tsoll < 253
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_boostactive AS "Boost"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_boostactive IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_summeractive AS "Summer"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_summeractive IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_holidayactive AS "Holiday"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_holidayactive IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_lock AS "Locked"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_lock IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_devicelock AS "Device Locked"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_devicelock IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_tist AS "Temp ist"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_tist IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_tsoll AS "Temp soll"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_tsoll IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_komfort AS "Temp komfort"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_komfort IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_absenk AS "Temp absenk"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_absenk IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

panels.title: Last heating device modes and temperatures

targets.rawSql:
SELECT name AS "Device", ha_heating_battery AS "Battery"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_battery IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT timestamp AS time, name AS metric, first(CASE WHEN ha_heating_windowopenactiv != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_heating_windowopenactiv IS NOT NULL
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, name || ' power' AS metric, avg(ha_powermeter_power) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_powermeter_power IS NOT NULL
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, name || ' voltage' AS metric, avg(ha_powermeter_voltage) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_powermeter_voltage IS NOT NULL
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, name || ' energy' AS metric, avg(ha_powermeter_energy) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_powermeter_energy IS NOT NULL
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT name AS "Name", ha_device_present AS "Device Present",
  ha_devicefunctions AS "Functions", ha_fw_version AS "Firmware Version",
  ha_hun_fun_interfaces AS "HAN-FAN Functions", ha_hun_fun_unittype AS "HAN-FAN Unit Type",
  ha_manufacturer AS "Manufacturer", ha_product_name AS "Product Name"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT name AS "Name", ha_product_name AS "Product Name",
  ha_battery_low AS "Battery Low", ha_battery_percent AS "Battery Level",
  ha_simpleonoff_state AS "Device State", ha_switch_state AS "Switch State",
  ha_switch_mode AS "Switch Mode", ha_switch_lock AS "Switch Lock",
  ha_switch_devicelock AS "Switch Device Lock"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -12, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box, name
ORDER BY name

SELECT timestamp AS time, name AS metric, first(CASE WHEN ha_switch_state != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_switch_state IS NOT NULL
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, name AS metric, first(CASE WHEN ha_simpleonoff_state != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_simpleonoff_state IS NOT NULL
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, name AS metric, first(CASE WHEN ha_alert != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND ha_alert IS NOT NULL
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT DISTINCT box
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY box
